packages.title: Interior Refresh
packages.description: A thorough interior detail that pulls out the grit Maine roads leave behind — floors, seats, vents, and every spot you actually touch.
includes: Full vacuum — carpets, mats, seats, trunk
Wipe-down of dash, console, and door panels
Pet hair removal from fabrics and crevices

packages.title: Exterior Shine
packages.description: Hand wash, careful decontamination, and a lasting finish so your vehicle looks sharp whether you’re headed to work or the lake.
includes: Bug & tar spot treatment as needed
Clay bar when the paint needs it

packages.title: Full Neatnik Detail
packages.description: The complete treatment — interior and exterior together. Built for folks who want their vehicle looking like someone who takes pride in it actually owns it.

addons.title: Headlight restoration
addons.detail: Clear up cloudy lenses so night driving feels safer again.

addons.title: Odor treatment
addons.detail: Deep clean focused on lingering smells — pets, smoke, or gym bag leftovers.

addons.title: Engine bay wipe-down (as accessible)
addons.detail: A careful wipe-down of reachable engine bay surfaces.

addons.title: Paint protection boost
addons.detail: Extra sealant layer for longer gloss between details.

heroHeadline: Detailing packages for real Maine vehicles
heroBody: Salt, mud, kids, dogs, grocery runs — your car sees it all. These packages cover the standard detailing work that brings it back: vacuum, wash, protect, and polish the details that matter.

cta.title: Not sure which package fits?
cta.body: Describe your vehicle and what’s bothering you — salt film, pet hair, a dull exterior — and you’ll get a straightforward recommendation.
